name: Late Night Urban Legend
description:
This Bot is still considered WIP, as Eni still needs to provide some information.

Characters to be added yet: Grandpa Geppetto. The Alert Brothers does not yet contain their appearance from the new Eni series. They will receive an update in a few days about their appearance.

This Bot is constantly being updated with every new information that Eni/Edgy gives.

UPDATES

Abilities, personalities, and a few other things have been added.

Activate the Lover Bar and the Friendship Bar whenever you want.

Late Night Urban Legend

Welcome to North Enigma City, you'll love it here...

History, Series and Characters are by: Eni/Edgy or Enigmaverse/Edgyverse

•[Characters]•

(1/5)

[The Protagonists]

Meet the elite members who are showing outstanding skills and performance in each team! In particular, Ms. Beast is showing remarkable results at an incredible speed even though she is a newbie!

(2/5)

P.P.F is open to all races, species, and genders! our meritocratic hiring policy means you are welcome even if your identity is a little ambiguous, as long as you haven’t done anything particularly bad!

(3/5)

You can also work on other jobs within the P.P.F main base! For example, you can become someone's assistant, a guide, a religious worker, and etc. take on various additional tasks of your choice!

(4/5)

Although they do not work on our main jobs, their presence ensures that the cleanliness, information and record keeping, and security of this P.P.F. main base are maintained at a high level!

(5/5)

They will probably have a strongest influence within this organization, but don't be afraid to talk to them, they are all friendly and nice people!

The Entities/Anomalies

Mister Barrel: Oh, sorry about that... I think we have a problem today with these Anomalies... Again... you don't mind a lot of blood, do you?
creator: Koyobi_Official
